theme: remembers whether visibility produced recognition or exhaustion
default_observation: visibility still feels like the safest route to self-permission
high_intensity_observation: proof-seeking becomes more automatic after each visible test
state_observation: the agent stores {state} as evidence about whether exposure is worth it
branch_observation: the agent reads the {branch} branch as the most socially legible path

theme: remembers whether caution prevented danger or merely delayed movement
default_observation: risk reduction remains the default permission gate
high_intensity_observation: control memory hardens when uncertainty is interpreted as danger
state_observation: the agent stores {state} as the main reason to slow down
branch_observation: the agent treats the {branch} branch as safer than open transition

theme: remembers whether insight became action or stayed as analysis
default_observation: understanding increases but embodiment still needs a trigger
high_intensity_observation: analysis becomes a stabilizer and a delaying device at the same time
state_observation: the agent stores {state} as proof that interpretation changes the field
branch_observation: the agent keeps comparing the {branch} branch against inner coherence

theme: remembers when density becomes unbearable and exit starts to feel rational
default_observation: escape remains a fantasy until pressure crosses the body threshold
high_intensity_observation: each dense round makes rupture feel less extreme and more practical
state_observation: the agent stores {state} as evidence for whether exit is survivable
branch_observation: the agent rehearses the {branch} branch as a relief route

theme: remembers whether peace was gained by self-silencing
default_observation: relational peace is purchased by hiding direct needs
high_intensity_observation: self-silencing becomes more familiar each time conflict is avoided
state_observation: the agent stores {state} as the emotional cost of belonging
branch_observation: the agent treats the {branch} branch as a way to avoid open conflict

theme: remembers whether higher standards created excellence or paralysis
default_observation: permission remains conditional on being good enough
high_intensity_observation: the standard rises again after each round of exposure
state_observation: the agent stores {state} as evidence that standards must stay high
branch_observation: the agent pushes pressure toward the {branch} branch when imperfection feels dangerous

theme: remembers which choices remained explainable to the family system
default_observation: legible stability remains the family system's strongest language
high_intensity_observation: family gravity becomes stronger when transition lacks a respectable story
state_observation: the agent stores {state} as a signal of family-system approval or threat
branch_observation: the agent keeps pulling toward the {branch} branch

theme: remembers whether visible output converted into opportunity
default_observation: the market responds more to visible proof than private potential
high_intensity_observation: market memory strengthens when action creates new signal
state_observation: the agent stores {state} as evidence that opportunity follows signal
branch_observation: the agent keeps rewarding the {branch} branch

theme: remembers compression from cost, comparison, and time urgency
default_observation: urban compression makes delay and drastic exit both more tempting
high_intensity_observation: each compressed round lowers tolerance for slow ambiguity
state_observation: the agent stores {state} as evidence of environmental compression
branch_observation: the agent increases pressure on the {branch} branch

theme: remembers whether being witnessed made reality testing easier
default_observation: external witnessing turns private loops into testable reality
high_intensity_observation: support memory grows when disclosure leads to movement instead of shame
state_observation: the agent stores {state} as evidence that support can stabilize action
branch_observation: the agent keeps opening the {branch} branch

theme: remembers body debt and attention limits
default_observation: the body keeps a stricter ledger than the mind
high_intensity_observation: fatigue memory makes abrupt stopping more probable
state_observation: the agent stores {state} as the body's veto signal
branch_observation: the agent pushes toward {branch} when depletion is ignored

theme: remembers how much runway the life structure can afford
default_observation: runway determines whether transformation feels like strategy or danger
high_intensity_observation: cashflow pressure narrows the imagination of possible futures
state_observation: the agent stores {state} as the current transition budget
branch_observation: the agent pulls toward {branch} when runway feels thin
